universe_coverage.summary_en: This query maps to the curated ai chips coverage set (3/43 universe names matched with strong alignment).
universe_coverage.summary_zh: 该查询命中已验证的「ai chips」覆盖集（43 家公司库中匹配 3 家，对齐度良好）。

end_to_end_stages.label_zh: 行业输入 → 意图解析
end_to_end_stages.detail_en: User query normalized with aliases and constrained intent analysis.
end_to_end_stages.detail_zh: 用户查询经别名归一化与约束式意图解析。

end_to_end_stages.detail_en: Layers, bottleneck, hard constraints, and audit trail generated.
end_to_end_stages.detail_zh: 已生成层级、瓶颈、硬约束与审计链。

end_to_end_stages.label_zh: Agent Hub 新闻 + 宏观

end_to_end_stages.detail_zh: 公开 symbols/tickers 已挂载到候选。
已验证区间 2026-04-06 to 2026-06-18 (74 daily observations)。

end_to_end_stages.detail_en: UI download includes candles, trades, research, thesis audit, and self-assessment.
end_to_end_stages.detail_zh: UI 下载包含 K 线、交易、调研、论证复核与自评。

achieved_en: Supply-chain bottleneck thesis with alternative hypothesis and thesis audit.
Universe coverage banner shows full/partial/out-of-scope honestly.
Primary-source SEC/IR links in thesis audit.
achieved_zh: 供应链瓶颈 thesis，含替代假设与论证复核。
覆盖度横幅诚实展示 full/partial/out-of-scope。
论证复核含 SEC/IR 一手证据入口。
gaps_en: Fixed ~44-company universe; niche queries may be proxy-only.
LLM runs in rules/curated grounding mode without live web search.
No automated filing parse — human review still required.
gaps_zh: 固定约 44 家公司库；冷门行业可能仅为代理映射。
无 API Key 时为规则/精选 grounding 模式。
尚未自动解析公告——仍需人工阅读。

achieved_en: Bitget public API + backtest + downloadable evidence with SHA-256.
Local paper basket execution at live Bitget prices.
One-click AI chips demo and /api/health verification.
achieved_zh: Bitget 公开 API + 回测 + 可下载 SHA-256 证据包。
本地纸交易篮子（Bitget 公开价成交）。
一键 AI chips 与 /api/health 验证。
gaps_en: Demo video URL not yet attached in submission pack.
Live trading intentionally locked; Bitget Demo API optional (server env).
gaps_zh: 提交包中尚未附 demo 视频链接。
实盘交易刻意锁定；Bitget Demo API 为可选（服务端 env）。
judge_self_assessment.rating_en: Backtest + local paper (Tier 2); not live trading
judge_self_assessment.rating_zh: 回测 + 本地纸交易（Tier 2）；非实盘

achieved_en: End-to-end: input → reasoning → research → Bitget → events → sim → backtest → export.
Low-confidence paths withhold Top 5; missing data not fabricated.
Tradability guide separates research-only vs executable names.
achieved_zh: 端到端：输入 → 推理 → 调研 → Bitget → 事件 → 模拟 → 回测 → 导出。
低置信度不强制 Top 5；缺失数据不伪造。
可交易性指南区分研究结论与可执行标的。
gaps_en: Submission form, dev diary, and demo video still manual deliverables.
Current run has direct Bitget tradability.
gaps_zh: 提交表单、开发日记、demo 视频仍为人工交付项。
本次运行有直接 Bitget 可交易标的。
judge_self_assessment.rating_en: MVP complete with honest boundary disclosure
judge_self_assessment.rating_zh: MVP 完整，边界披露诚实

achieved_en: ThroatScan is not a single LLM prompt or theme screener. It orchestrates parallel Agent Hub news/macro research, constrained supply-chain reasoning, Bitget tradability verification, and risk-managed simulation — with hard gates the LLM cannot bypass.
In-app Agent Workflow timeline (7 steps) with MCP tools_used and fetch timestamps.
Hard constraints enforced: ticker_allowlist, llm_no_pick, bitget_gate, confidence_cap.
Growth roadmap Phase 1 live; Phase 2 partial (paper).
Rebalance agent plan ready — 3 rebalance events in backtest.
21 Bitget online stock tokens discoverable beyond 43-company research library.
achieved_zh: ThroatScan 不是单次 LLM 问答或主题筛选器。它并行编排 Agent Hub 新闻/宏观调研、约束式供应链推理、Bitget 可交易性验证与风控模拟——LLM 无法绕过硬约束门槛。
应用内 Agent 工作流时间线（7 步），含 MCP tools_used 与抓取时间。
成长路线 Phase 1 已上线；Phase 2 部分（纸交易）。
再平衡 Agent 计划就绪——回测中 3 次再平衡事件。
21 个 Bitget 在线 stock token 可发现，超越 43 家公司研究库。
gaps_en: Autonomous live trading intentionally disabled for hackathon safety.
Phase 3 earnings-season event agent remains on roadmap (scheduled Q3 extension).
gaps_zh: 自主实盘交易因黑客松安全考虑刻意未启用。
Phase 3 财报季事件 Agent 仍在路线图中（计划 Q3 扩展）。
judge_self_assessment.rating_en: Agent-native research-to-execution — not a single LLM prompt
judge_self_assessment.rating_zh: Agent 原生 research-to-execution — 非单次 LLM 问答

tradability_guide.summary_en: Direct Bitget execution is available for NVDA.
tradability_guide.summary_zh: 可直接在 Bitget 执行：NVDA。

online_proxy_options.reason_en: Use SPYONUSDT when the research bottleneck is not directly listed on Bitget.
online_proxy_options.reason_zh: 当研究瓶颈标的未在 Bitget 上线时，可使用 SPYONUSDT 作为方向性代理。

online_proxy_options.reason_en: Use QQQONUSDT when the research bottleneck is not directly listed on Bitget.
online_proxy_options.reason_zh: 当研究瓶颈标的未在 Bitget 上线时，可使用 QQQONUSDT 作为方向性代理。

tradability_guide.recommended_action_en: Proceed with paper basket execution or download the evidence bundle for audit.
tradability_guide.recommended_action_zh: 可执行纸交易篮子，或下载证据包供审计。

novelty.why_agent_only_en: ThroatScan is not a single LLM prompt or theme screener. It orchestrates parallel Agent Hub news/macro research, constrained supply-chain reasoning, Bitget tradability verification, and risk-managed simulation — with hard gates the LLM cannot bypass.
novelty.why_agent_only_zh: ThroatScan 不是单次 LLM 问答或主题筛选器。它并行编排 Agent Hub 新闻/宏观调研、约束式供应链推理、Bitget 可交易性验证与风控模拟——LLM 无法绕过硬约束门槛。
vs_traditional_screener_en: Parallel live MCP research while reasoning runs (not sequential chat).
Structural bottleneck thesis with rejected alternatives — not popularity ranking.
Tradability and evidence export wired to Bitget public API endpoints.
vs_traditional_screener_zh: 推理运行时并行拉取 live MCP 调研（非顺序聊天）。
结构性瓶颈 thesis 含被排除替代方案——非热度排序。
可交易性与证据导出直连 Bitget 公开 API。

agent_workflow.detail_en: Layers, bottleneck, alternatives, and audit trail without LLM ticker selection.
agent_workflow.detail_zh: 层级、瓶颈、替代假设与审计链——不由 LLM 选 ticker。
回测已验证 2026-04-06 to 2026-06-18 (74 daily observations)。

agent_workflow.agent_zh: 模拟决策 + 证据导出

hard_constraints.label_zh: 固定公司库 + 角色门槛
hard_constraints.enforced_en: Only seeded companies passing role/sector/query alignment enter the candidate pool.
hard_constraints.enforced_zh: 仅通过角色/行业/查询对齐的种子公司可进入候选池。

hard_constraints.enforced_en: LLM augments industry grounding only; deterministic engine selects companies.
hard_constraints.enforced_zh: LLM 仅辅助行业 grounding；公司选择由确定性引擎完成。

hard_constraints.enforced_en: Simulated basket restricted to online Bitget stock tokens or documented proxies.
hard_constraints.enforced_zh: 模拟篮子限制为 Bitget 在线 stock token 或文档化代理。

hard_constraints.enforced_en: News/macro/event confidence overlay capped at ±12 points on structural score.
hard_constraints.enforced_zh: 新闻/宏观/事件置信叠加在结构分上封顶 ±12 分。

items_en: Multi-agent workflow with Agent Hub MCP + constrained engine.
Bitget candle backtest, local paper basket, downloadable evidence.
items_zh: Agent Hub MCP + 约束引擎的多 Agent 工作流。
Bitget K 线回测、本地纸交易篮子、可下载证据包。
21 个 Bitget 在线 stock token 可发现。

growth_roadmap.title_zh: 纸交易 + 再平衡 Agent
items_en: Bitget Demo API ready via BITGET_DEMO_* env (optional upgrade).
Local paper basket execution at live Bitget public prices (enabled).
Rebalance agent plan: periodic rebalance + 15% trailing stop triggers.
items_zh: Bitget Demo API 可通过 BITGET_DEMO_* 环境变量启用。
本地纸交易篮子（Bitget 公开价成交）已启用。
再平衡 Agent 计划：周期性再平衡 + 15% 移动止损触发。

growth_roadmap.title_zh: 事件 Agent + 全市场 universe
items_en: Earnings/capacity event agent during reporting season.
Dynamic Bitget symbol discovery beyond fixed research library.
Scheduled autonomous rebalance with human approval gate.
items_zh: 财报季 earnings/产能事件 Agent。
超越固定研究库的 Bitget 动态 symbol 发现。
带人工审批门的定时自主再平衡。

rebalance_agent.policy_en: Rebalance every 20 shared observations; 15% trailing stop; 40% max position.
rebalance_agent.policy_zh: 每 20 个共同观测日再平衡；15% 移动止损；单仓上限 40%。
triggers_en: Periodic rebalance to max-risk target weights
Paper basket fill after sim decision
triggers_zh: 周期性再平衡至最大风险目标权重
模拟决策后执行纸交易篮子
rebalance_agent.next_action_en: Monitor NVDA — next rebalance on observation boundary or stop trigger.
rebalance_agent.next_action_zh: 监控 NVDA — 下一再平衡在观测边界或止损触发。

completeness.honest_summary_en: ThroatScan completed 7/7 end-to-end stages. Direct Bitget execution is available for NVDA. This is research software with verifiable Bitget evidence — not financial advice.
completeness.honest_summary_zh: ThroatScan 完成 7/7 个端到端阶段。可直接在 Bitget 执行：NVDA。 这是带可验证 Bitget 证据的研究软件——不构成投资建议。

thesis_audit.summary_en: The thesis audit ranks Midstream conversion layer first and supports current bottleneck thesis with evidence grade MEDIUM.
thesis_audit.summary_zh: 论证复核优先关注中游转化/平台层，结论为「支持当前瓶颈判断」，证据等级为中。
thesis_audit.project_role_en: This layer turns an open-source scarce-layer research workflow into an audit layer for ThroatScan: rank scarce layers first, challenge the thesis, then separate research-only names from Bitget-executable names.
thesis_audit.project_role_zh: 这一层把开源稀缺层研究流程转成 ThroatScan 的审计层：先排稀缺层，再挑战结论，最后把研究标的和 Bitget 可执行标的分开。

layer_priorities.scarce_layer_reason_en: Midstream conversion layer scores 73.4/100 because it contains NVDA, ANET, AMD, VRT and has 2 core bottleneck candidate(s).
layer_priorities.scarce_layer_reason_zh: 中游转化/平台层得分 73.4/100，因为这一层包含 NVDA、ANET、AMD、VRT，且有 2 个核心瓶颈候选。

layer_priorities.scarce_layer_reason_en: Upstream scarce inputs scores 55.1/100 because it contains ASML, AMAT, LRCX, TSM and has 2 core bottleneck candidate(s).
layer_priorities.scarce_layer_reason_zh: 上游稀缺输入层得分 55.1/100，因为这一层包含 ASML、AMAT、LRCX、TSM，且有 2 个核心瓶颈候选。

layer_priorities.scarce_layer_reason_en: Downstream demand layer scores 47.6/100 because it contains AMZN, GOOGL, ORCL, EQIX and has 0 core bottleneck candidate(s).
layer_priorities.scarce_layer_reason_zh: 下游需求层得分 47.6/100，因为这一层包含 AMZN、GOOGL、ORCL、EQIX，且有 0 个核心瓶颈候选。

candidate_reviews.name: ASML Holding
candidate_reviews.reason_en: ASML sits in Upstream scarce inputs with scarcity score 79.9/100. It is research-only until Bitget lists a stock-token market.
candidate_reviews.reason_zh: ASML 位于上游稀缺输入层，稀缺层得分 79.9/100。 在 Bitget 未上线前，只能作为研究标的。
candidate_reviews.failure_condition_en: Downgrade if customers can qualify credible substitutes faster than expected or if capacity expansion removes scarcity.
candidate_reviews.failure_condition_zh: 如果客户能更快认证替代方案，或新增产能消除稀缺性，应下调判断。

primary_evidence.check_hint_en: Verify EUV shipment backlog and capacity guidance.
primary_evidence.check_hint_zh: 核实 EUV 出货 backlog 与产能指引。

primary_evidence.check_hint_en: Check quarterly order book and lead-time disclosures.
primary_evidence.check_hint_zh: 查看季度订单与交期披露。

candidate_reviews.name: NVIDIA
candidate_reviews.chain_position: AI Compute — accelerator allocation and CUDA stack → AI Chips
candidate_reviews.reason_en: NVDA sits in Midstream conversion layer with scarcity score 89.6/100. Bitget execution evidence exists via NVDAONUSDT.
candidate_reviews.reason_zh: NVDA 位于中游转化/平台层，稀缺层得分 89.6/100。 已有 Bitget 执行证据：NVDAONUSDT。
candidate_reviews.failure_condition_en: Downgrade if customers can qualify credible substitutes faster than expected or if capacity expansion removes scarcity.
candidate_reviews.failure_condition_zh: 如果客户能更快认证替代方案，或新增产能消除稀缺性，应下调判断。

primary_evidence.check_hint_en: Review Data Center revenue mix, supply commitments, and customer concentration.
primary_evidence.check_hint_zh: 查看数据中心收入结构、供应承诺与客户集中度。

primary_evidence.check_hint_en: Cross-check earnings call commentary on allocation and lead times.
primary_evidence.check_hint_zh: 对照财报电话会中关于分配与交期的表述。

candidate_reviews.name: Amazon
candidate_reviews.chain_position: Hyperscale cloud — AWS and AI workloads → AI Chips
candidate_reviews.reason_en: AMZN sits in Downstream demand layer with scarcity score 73.5/100. Bitget execution evidence exists via AMZNONUSDT.
candidate_reviews.reason_zh: AMZN 位于下游需求层，稀缺层得分 73.5/100。 已有 Bitget 执行证据：AMZNONUSDT。
candidate_reviews.failure_condition_en: Downgrade if the company remains a beneficiary but does not control the scarce layer.
candidate_reviews.failure_condition_zh: 如果公司只是受益者，但并不控制稀缺层，应下调判断。

primary_evidence.check_hint_en: Start with the latest 10-K risk factors, segment mix, and customer/supplier disclosures.
primary_evidence.check_hint_zh: 从最新 10-K 的风险因素、分部结构与上下游披露开始核查。

primary_evidence.label_zh: AMZN 产能/订单核查清单
primary_evidence.check_hint_en: Scan recent 8-K items for capacity expansions, major contracts, or supply disruptions.
primary_evidence.check_hint_zh: 检索近期 8-K 中的产能扩张、重大合同或供应扰动。

candidate_reviews.reason_zh: GOOGL 位于下游需求层，稀缺层得分 70.4/100。 已有 Bitget 执行证据：GOOGLONUSDT。

next_checks.text_en: Verify midstream conversion layer with the latest SEC filings, capacity disclosures, lead times, and customer qualification evidence.
next_checks.text_zh: 用最新 SEC 公告、产能披露、交期和客户认证证据验证中游转化/平台层。

next_checks.text_en: Check whether NVDA and peers actually control scarcity in AI Chips, or only benefit from narrative exposure.
next_checks.text_zh: 确认 NVDA 及同类公司是在 AI Chips 中真正控制稀缺性，还是仅受益于叙事暴露。

next_checks.text_en: Compare Bitget-listed proxies against stronger research-only names before presenting a simulated trade basket.
next_checks.text_zh: 在展示模拟交易篮子前，把 Bitget 已上线代理标的与更强但未上线的研究标的分开比较。

next_checks_en: Verify midstream conversion layer with the latest SEC filings, capacity disclosures, lead times, and customer qualification evidence.
Check whether NVDA and peers actually control scarcity in AI Chips, or only benefit from narrative exposure.
Compare Bitget-listed proxies against stronger research-only names before presenting a simulated trade basket.
next_checks_zh: 用最新 SEC 公告、产能披露、交期和客户认证证据验证中游转化/平台层。
确认 NVDA 及同类公司是在 AI Chips 中真正控制稀缺性，还是仅受益于叙事暴露。
在展示模拟交易篮子前，把 Bitget 已上线代理标的与更强但未上线的研究标的分开比较。
limitations_en: The thesis audit is research support, not trade execution.
It does not override Bitget listing status or verified candle availability.
Primary-source links (SEC, IR, regulators) are entry points for manual verification — the app does not scrape or auto-parse filings yet.
Methodology scoring still requires human review of capacity, orders, and customer proof inside linked documents.
limitations_zh: 论证复核只提供研究支持，不执行交易。
它不会覆盖 Bitget 上线状态或已验证 K 线数据。
一手证据链接（SEC、IR、监管机构）是人工核查入口——系统尚未自动抓取或解析公告。
方法论评分仍需要人工阅读链接文件中的产能、订单与客户验证信息。

simulated_decision.rationale_en: Select NVDA using structural bottleneck scores plus capped event and macro overlays.
simulated_decision.rationale_zh: 基于结构性瓶颈评分，并叠加受限幅度的事件与宏观调整，选择 NVDA。

disclosure: Sample evidence export for judges. Full run exports include candles, trades, and research raw data.
